headline: Dow Jones Futures: Market Dives As Oil Prices Hit $100 In Iran War; What To Do Now
summary: The major indexes sold off to hit six-month lows as oil prices near $100 amid the Iran war. Tesla deliveries loom.

headline: A Look At TJX Companies (TJX) Valuation After Recent Share Price Slip And Long Term Gains
summary: TJX Companies stock snapshot after recent trading move TJX Companies (TJX) shares recently slipped about 1.6% in a single session, drawing attention to how the off price retailer is trading after a strong 1 year total return above 30%. Over the past week the stock has been roughly flat, while returns over the past month and past 3 months have been mildly negative. Year to date, TJX shows a small positive total return, which contrasts with its stronger multi year record. See our latest...

headline: Vanguard’s VCR ETF Carries 40% Amazon and Tesla Exposure Dressed as Consumer Discretionary
summary: Vanguard Consumer Discretionary ETF (NYSEARCA:VCR) is down nearly 9% year-to-date, but the story behind that number matters more than the number itself. This fund carries the “consumer discretionary” label, yet nearly 40% of its portfolio sits in just two stocks that behave more like technology bets than traditional retail plays. What VCR Is Actually Built ... Vanguard’s VCR ETF Carries 40% Amazon and Tesla Exposure Dressed as Consumer Discretionary
